email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Customer Service Agent bij MEGA in Mechelen. Uw oproep voor een klantgerichte, nauwkeurige medewerker sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en vaardigheden.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto werk ik dagelijks met klantcommunicatie en administratieve opvolging. Ik ben gewend om meerdere taken tegelijk te beheren, nauwkeurig te werken en klanten proactief te ondersteunen. Mijn technische achtergrond maakt dat ik snel nieuwe systemen en CRM-tools oppik. Daarnaast spreek ik vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 – ik volg lessen om dit verder te verbeteren.

Ik ben gemotiveerd om mijn carrière te richten op klantenservice en bij te dragen aan het groeiende team van MEGA. Ik ben flexibel inzetbaar en woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Mechelen.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een persoonlijk gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service Agent position at MEGA in Mechelen. Your call for a customer-oriented, accurate employee aligns perfectly with my experience and skills.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I handle client communication and administrative follow-up daily. I am used to multitasking, working accurately, and proactively supporting customers. My technical background allows me to quickly learn new systems and CRM tools. Additionally, I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 – I am taking lessons to improve further.

I am motivated to focus my career on customer service and contribute to MEGA's growing team. I am flexible and live in Zwijndrecht, near Mechelen.

I would be happy to explain my motivation in a personal interview.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de functie van Customer Service Agent bij MEGA in Mechelen. Uw oproep voor een klantgerichte, nauwkeurige en communicatieve medewerker sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring en persoonlijkheid.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto werk ik dagelijks met klantcommunicatie en administratieve opvolging. Ik behandel vragen per e-mail, beheer dossiers en zorg voor een correcte en tijdige afhandeling. Deze ervaring heeft mij geleerd om gestructureerd te werken, ook onder druk. Daarnaast ben ik gewend om met meerdere applicaties tegelijk te werken, zoals CRM-systemen, Google Analytics en contentmanagementsystemen. Mijn technische achtergrond maakt dat ik snel nieuwe tools eigen maak.

Wat mij aanspreekt in deze functie is het directe contact met klanten en de kans om écht het verschil te maken. Ik luister graag, begrijp snel wat de klant nodig heeft en denk proactief mee in oplossingen. Uw familiale werksfeer en de aanwezigheid van kantoorhonden spreken mij ook aan – ik hou van een warme, menselijke omgeving.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1. Ik volg momenteel lessen om mijn Nederlands verder te verbeteren, zodat ik foutloos kan communiceren. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Mechelen, en ben fulltime beschikbaar.

Graag maak ik kennis om mijn motivatie en ervaring verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Customer Service Agent position at MEGA in Mechelen. Your call for a customer-oriented, accurate, and communicative employee aligns perfectly with my experience and personality.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I handle client communication and administrative follow-up daily. I answer emails, manage dossiers, and ensure correct and timely processing. This experience has taught me to work in a structured way, even under pressure. Additionally, I am used to working with multiple applications simultaneously, such as CRM systems, Google Analytics, and content management systems. My technical background allows me to quickly learn new tools.

What attracts me to this role is the direct contact with customers and the opportunity to truly make a difference. I enjoy listening, quickly understand what the customer needs, and proactively think along with solutions. Your family-like atmosphere and the presence of office dogs also appeal to me – I like a warm, human environment.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1. I am currently taking lessons to further improve my Dutch so I can communicate flawlessly. I live in Zwijndrecht, near Mechelen, and am available full-time.

I would be happy to meet to discuss my motivation and experience further.

Kind regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
• Customer service experience: daily client communication, email handling, and administrative follow-up at Episto
• Strong multitasking and accuracy: managed multiple client projects and tools simultaneously
• Quick learner of new systems: technical background in web development and CRM tools
• Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1, actively improving)
• Located in Zwijndrecht, near Mechelen; full-time availability
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Customer Service · Client Communication · Administrative Support
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior professional with strong customer service and administrative skills, gained through client-facing roles in digital marketing and logistics. Experienced in handling client inquiries via email and phone, managing dossiers, and ensuring accurate follow-up. Technically adept, quickly learning new CRM and office tools. Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch at B1 level with active improvement. Based in Zwijndrecht, near Mechelen. Motivated to build a career in customer service.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & communication: handling inquiries via phone and email, client follow-up, proactive problem-solving
- Administrative support: dossier management, data entry, accurate record-keeping
- Multitasking & accuracy: managing multiple tasks and applications simultaneously in fast-paced environments
- CRM & office tools: quick to learn new systems; experience with content management systems, Google Workspace
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1, actively improving)
- Technical: WordPress, Elementor, Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Handle client communication and administrative follow-up for multiple client projects
- Manage email inquiries, coordinate content updates, and ensure timely delivery
- Use various tools (CRM, analytics, CMS) to track and report on project progress
- Maintain accuracy and organization while juggling multiple client accounts

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment
- Demonstrated reliability and attention to detail under pressure

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)
- Collaborated with team to ensure smooth user experience

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site; managed content updates and client communication
- Implemented structured data and technical optimizations; monitored performance

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
